commit.subject: LU-12668 ec: basic tests for adding and resyncing ec
commit.message:
LU-12668 ec: basic tests for adding and resyncing ec

This test requires 8 OSTs.

Number of parity stripes used can not exceed the number of stripes
in the data mirror or else the parity data will not fit in the extent.
Add tests that we can not create ec mirrors that violate this.

Add test that resyncing computes the parities correctly.

TODO: lfs setstripe should use ec_split_stripes() and check k0/k1
      when deciding if to allow the creation or ont, not the nubmer
      of paritis in --ec k+p
TODO lfs setstripe should allow --ec x+y where y == x

Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I7799553bfe34097c0fbc1087c03d89d013d10673
